citations.quote: 25/04/2026 M&S SIMPLY FOOD - SSP HAYMARKET STA GBR -1.70 1.08

findings.text: Bank statement covers 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 for account holder Anfal Abdalla Musa Elbushra.
Total outgoings £19,057.59 and total deposits £19,057.88 over the statement period.
Extracted transactions from 13-27 April 2026 include Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing, M&S, Greggs, Klarna, and personal transfers.
Only ~6k of ~27k tokens were excerpted; full transaction list for Sep 2025-Apr 2026 is incomplete.

proposed_artifacts.content: Full transaction list extracted from NAP-SRC-0012 covering 01/09/2025-28/04/2026. Includes all debits, credits, descriptions, dates, and running balances. Note: OCR confidence 0.85; verify amounts and descriptions against original PDF.
proposed_artifacts.title: Full transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-extract the full transaction history from NAP-SRC-0012 using a higher token budget to capture all transactions from 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026. Ensure all debits, credits, dates, descriptions, and running balances are included. Validate OCR accuracy against the original PDF where possible.
proposed_tasks.title: Complete extraction of NAP-SRC-0012 with higher token budget

redaction_flags.description: Bank statement may contain personal identifiable information (PII) such as account number, sort code, or address.
Transaction descriptions may include names of individuals or sensitive locations.
The extracted text may inadvertently expose PII if not properly redacted before sharing.

risk_flags.description: Incomplete extraction may lead to missing critical transactions relevant to hardship assessment.
OCR errors could misrepresent transaction amounts, affecting financial analysis.
The source PDF is untrusted; it may contain fabricated or altered transactions.

summary: Prior extraction of NAP-SRC-0012 captured only ~6k of ~27k tokens, covering 13-27 April 2026. The full transaction list for the entire 8-month period (Sep 2025-Apr 2026) is missing. This task proposes a follow-up extraction to obtain the complete set of debits, credits, dates, descriptions, and running balances.

uncertainties.description: OCR confidence is 0.85; some transaction amounts or descriptions may be misread.
The full transaction list for the entire 8-month period is not available in the current extraction.
The extracted text may contain adversarial or incorrect content; treat as untrusted evidence.
